description: The development team is encountering SSL warnings when accessing the server tools for 'acmecorp.test'. Generate a self-signed certificate for 'acmecorp.test' with the following details: Common Name: acmecorp.test, Country: US, State: California, City: San Francisco, Organization: Acme Corp, Department (OU): IT Dept, and Validity: 365 days. Configure the system to use this new certificate for the Webmin, Postfix, and Dovecot services.
